details.text: Global interconnect for 3 global loads and 1 global store. Reduce number of global loads and stores to simplify global interconnect.

links.guide: Best Practices Guide : Global Memory Interconnect

details.text: Channel is implemented 8 bits wide by 32 deep.
Channel is implemented 8 bits wide by 32 deep.
Type: Shift Register (5 or fewer tap points)

Additional information.text: Requested size 147456 bytes, implemented size 262144 bytes, stallable, 16 reads and 1 write.

details.text: Reduce the number of write accesses or fix banking to make this memory system stall-free. Banking may be improved by using compile-time known indexing on lowest array dimension.
